data.body: Validation HARNESS implemented: tests/interfaces/test_llm_live.py exercises the real langgraph runner end-to-end (review_ticket + review_code) and asserts the call succeeds (no temperature 400 on claude-opus-4.x), structured_response is populated (no StructuredOutputError), and the output validates against review_result with model/runner provenance + resolved citations. Marked integration so CI excludes it (-m "not integration"); skips unless an API key + the agents extra are present. NOT yet executed live in this environment (no API keys here), so leaving in_progress: run ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... pytest -m integration to complete; Langfuse-trace + MCP-session checks need LANGFUSE_*/REBAR_LLM_MCP_SERVERS configured.
